# Anymake

> Agentic build system. Takes any software idea — SaaS, CLI, library, API, internal tool, static site, or hobby project — from raw concept to a finished, shipped result through a six-phase, artifact-driven methodology that adapts to what you're building, with a built-in multi-agent implementation engine.

## What Anymake is

Anymake is an AI skill for [OpenCode.ai](https://opencode.ai) that guides product development through six disciplined phases — Foundation, Discovery, Planning, Solutioning, Implementation, and Launch — producing a concrete artifact at every step, requiring user approval at every phase gate, and autonomously building the product in Phase 4 with a three-tier agent system.

**Install:**
```json
{ "plugin": ["anymake@git+https://github.com/R3dy/Anymake.git"] }
```
Add to `~/.config/opencode/opencode.json`, then restart OpenCode.

**Trigger:** Say "Start a new project" or "Continue [project name]".

## Core concepts

- **Phases** — Six sequential phases, each gated on user approval before advancing
- **Artifacts** — Every phase produces a document. Documents are truth; conversation memory is not
- **One step per session** — Prevents scope creep; every session ends with a clear artifact and named next action
- **PHASE_STATE.md** — The system's bookmark; records current phase, step, last artifact, and next action
- **PARKING_LOT.md** — Scope requests that arrive mid-phase; logged, never acted on without a new gate
- **BOARD.md** — Live agile board updated after every Phase 4 agent action

## The six phases

- Phase 0 – Foundation: Define elevator pitch, scope, revenue model, success metrics → `PROJECT.md`
- Phase 1 – Discovery: Market research, competitor analysis, user personas, risk register → `docs/01-discovery.md`
- Phase 2 – Planning: PRD, UX design system + prototype, architecture decisions (ADRs), monetization plan
- Phase 3 – Solutioning: Epics, user stories with acceptance criteria, ordered backlog, dependency graph
- Phase 4 – Implementation: Scaffold → Auth → Agentic build loop → Security review → Staging deploy
- Phase 5 – Launch: Live deployment, metrics dashboard, growth loop

## Phase 4 agent system

Three-tier autonomous build loop in `AGENTS/`:

- **Orchestrator** — Reads backlog and dependency graph, manages BOARD.md, dispatches Workers and Validators one story at a time, enforces PR policy, escalates to user only when blocked
- **Worker** — Receives one story via task brief, implements in strict layer order (Schema → Migration → API → Frontend → Tests), commits each layer, opens a PR
- **Validator** — Checks every acceptance criterion, runs security checklist, returns PASS / FAIL / ESCALATE
- **Policies** — Shared retry matrix (max 2 environment retries, max 1 implementation retry), PR review rules (PRs 1–3 always require user review; webhooks/payments always require user review), escalation phrase lexicon, failure classification guide

## Autonomous mode (yolo)

Activated by adding `--yolo` to any project trigger. Spawns a **Product Owner Proxy** sub-agent (`AGENTS/product-owner-proxy.md`) at each phase gate instead of waiting for human approval. The proxy applies strict per-gate criteria and returns APPROVED, specific required changes, or ESCALATE TO USER. Security failures always escalate to the real user regardless of mode. Autonomous mode is recorded in `PHASE_STATE.md` as `autonomous_mode: true`.

## Key files

- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md) — Top-level skill definition (loaded by OpenCode plugin)
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — Full agent guide: hierarchy, rules, file conventions, anti-patterns
- [.opencode/INSTALL.md](.opencode/INSTALL.md) — Detailed installation and troubleshooting
- [PHASE_GUIDES/phase-0.md](PHASE_GUIDES/phase-0.md) — Foundation phase guide
- [PHASE_GUIDES/phase-1.md](PHASE_GUIDES/phase-1.md) — Discovery phase guide
- [PHASE_GUIDES/phase-2.md](PHASE_GUIDES/phase-2.md) — Planning phase guide
- [PHASE_GUIDES/phase-3.md](PHASE_GUIDES/phase-3.md) — Solutioning phase guide
- [PHASE_GUIDES/phase-4.md](PHASE_GUIDES/phase-4.md) — Implementation phase guide (includes agent activation)
- [PHASE_GUIDES/phase-5.md](PHASE_GUIDES/phase-5.md) — Launch phase guide
- [AGENTS/orchestrator.md](AGENTS/orchestrator.md) — Orchestrator agent instructions (includes autonomous mode handling)
- [AGENTS/worker.md](AGENTS/worker.md) — Worker agent instructions
- [AGENTS/validator.md](AGENTS/validator.md) — Validator agent instructions
- [AGENTS/product-owner-proxy.md](AGENTS/product-owner-proxy.md) — Product Owner Proxy instructions (autonomous mode gate evaluator)
- [AGENTS/policies.md](AGENTS/policies.md) — Retry, PR review, escalation policies, and autonomous mode policy
- [TEMPLATES/project.md](TEMPLATES/project.md) — Phase 0 artifact template
- [TEMPLATES/prd.md](TEMPLATES/prd.md) — PRD template
- [TEMPLATES/ux-design.md](TEMPLATES/ux-design.md) — UX design system template
- [TEMPLATES/adr.md](TEMPLATES/adr.md) — Architecture decision record template
- [TEMPLATES/monetization.md](TEMPLATES/monetization.md) — Revenue model template
- [TEMPLATES/epic.md](TEMPLATES/epic.md) — Epic template
- [TEMPLATES/story.md](TEMPLATES/story.md) — User story template
- [TEMPLATES/task-brief.md](TEMPLATES/task-brief.md) — Phase 4 Worker task specification template
- [TEMPLATES/BOARD.md](TEMPLATES/BOARD.md) — Agile board template (copied at Phase 4 start)
- [TEMPLATES/validation-report.md](TEMPLATES/validation-report.md) — Validator report template
- [TEMPLATES/phase-state.md](TEMPLATES/phase-state.md) — PHASE_STATE.md template
- [TEMPLATES/launch-checklist.md](TEMPLATES/launch-checklist.md) — Pre-launch checklist
- [TEMPLATES/metrics-dashboard.md](TEMPLATES/metrics-dashboard.md) — Metrics dashboard template
